step_outcomes.1: Monorepo scaffolded: pnpm + Turborepo + TypeScript + ESLint 9 + Prettier. 4 packages.
step_outcomes.2: Shared package: 15 Zod schemas, types, constants, transition rules, ULID utility. 199 tests.
step_outcomes.3: Drizzle ORM + SQLite: 13 tables, indexes, FTS5 virtual tables, migrations, seed. 31 tests.
step_outcomes.4: Server foundation: OpenAPIHono, middleware (request-id, logger, CORS, error-handler, auth stub), test utilities. 21 tests.
step_outcomes.5: Projects CRUD: service layer + routes + 31 integration tests. Established API pattern.
step_outcomes.6: Proposals API: CRUD + role-enforced transitions + auto-transition + implementProposal. 55 tests.
step_outcomes.7: Epics + Tasks API: CRUD with filtering, sorting, pagination, subtasks, context JSON. 61 tests.
step_outcomes.8: Comments (polymorphic), Labels (project-scoped), Dependencies (BFS cycle detection). 56 tests.
step_outcomes.9: FTS5 search with triggers, activity logging in all services, milestones, git refs, OpenAPI finalized (30 paths). 40 tests.
step_outcomes.10: Web UI shell: Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui (15 components), TanStack Router, dark mode, collapsible sidebar.
step_outcomes.11: Project + Proposal pages: card grid, status tabs, discussion thread, accept/reject, spawned work items.
step_outcomes.12: Task list (table, filters, sort, pagination), task detail (inline editing, typed comments, context, subtasks, dependencies), epic list (progress bars).
step_outcomes.13: MCP server: 7 tools (pm_list_projects, pm_list_tasks, pm_get_task, pm_search, pm_list_proposals, pm_get_proposal, pm_discuss_proposal), 2 resources, 31 tests.

parallelism_notes: Steps 6+7 ran in parallel. Steps 11+13 ran in parallel. All merges clean or resolved.
